name: NEXUS IDE loads with editor and preview tabs
description: When a visitor opens NEXUS, the page loads successfully showing the IDE shell with the code editor tab active, the NEXUS branding in the header, and the floating bottom dock with editor/preview/agent tabs.

planSteps.description: Verify the NEXUS logo and branding text is visible in the top header bar
Verify a floating bottom dock is visible with three navigation tabs labeled in Arabic
Verify the main content area shows a code editor with line numbers and the default HTML code is visible
